title: CVE-2026-10033 EventON Action User <= 2.5.14 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via evoau_save_capability AJAX Action
sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10033 EventON Action User  2514 - Missing Authorization to Unauthentica
id: e649c221-fcc7-5ee0-bbf2-08dade425947
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-10033 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: PRIVESC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10033
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/24
modified: 2026/07/24
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_token:
        EventID:
            - 4672
            - 4673
        PrivilegeList|contains:
            - 'SeDebugPrivilege'
            - 'SeImpersonatePrivilege'
            - 'SeTcbPrivilege'
    selection_newservice:
        EventID: 4697
        ServiceName|contains: 'PSEXE'
    condition: selection_token or selection_newservice
falsepositives:
    - System administrators performing maintenance
    - Legitimate service installations
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10033 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-24T10:31:26Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-10033", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-10033 Exploitation Attempt - PRIVESC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5731683; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-24, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
_notice: Detection rules require PRO subscription. Subscribe at intel.cyberdudebivash.com/upgrade.html
